top_signals.title: Goldman to Sell $2.5 Billion Preferreds Following Spread Low
top_signals.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. is selling new preferred shares Monday, just days after a metric determining risk and value in these securities hit its lowest level since the global financial crisis.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
